who: medical clinic billing managers processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For medical clinic billing managers processing 10–20 invoices/month, delays in insurance verification cause cash flow gaps. We generate patient insurance verification reports instead of manual verification processes.
problem: Delays in insurance verification lead to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for billing managers
